Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk has planted corn simultaneously on the plantations of the Astra Agro Group subsidiaries spread across Sumatra, Kalimantan and Sulawesi to support the 2025 food self-sufficiency program, according to the Vice President of Investor Relations and Public Affairs of Astra Agro, Fenny Sofyan. The company involves the community that lives and settles within the company, namely employees and their families or referred to as communities. So far, we have had community empowerment programs, one of which is food and economic independence. through various activities, he said in his statement in Jakarta, Wednesday. Currently, the palm oil company has 499 associations spread across eight provinces and consists of more than 30,000 heads of families. According to him, they have succeeded in cultivating various types of plants and also processing waste waste into goods of high economic value, thus providing benefits for the progress of their communities. Meanwhile, Astra Agro's vice president of partnership management, Jonet Budiarto, revealed that the simultaneous planting program is in line with the government's target to make Indonesia a world food basket by 2045, by focusing on increasing the production of various strategic food commodities, corn has become one of the leading crops, the potential of corn commodities in contributing to food security and the national economy is very large, he said, not just a food ingredient, corn is known as an important raw material for various downstream industries such as animal feed, flour and other processed foods. Corn is an important source of raw materials for 32 industrial sectors, placing corn as a commodity with the third highest added value in the agricultural sector after rice and oil palm. The land selected has gone through a strict curation process based on established land suitability criteria, said Jonet, who is also responsible for operational implementation of the Astra Agro food self-sufficiency program. In addition to approval obtained from the local agriculture and food department, risk assessments are also carried out by the company's internal team. According to him, this step is to ensure that the food self-sufficiency program is not only productivity-oriented but also pays attention to aspects of environmental sustainability.

Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk Astra Agro emphasizes the importance of the sustainability aspect through a zero deforestation policy in order to preserve the environment. Director of Astra Agro Sahari said that the company has implemented a zero deforestation policy in all its operations since a decade ago. This sustainability policy has become a company DNA that must be adhered to by the entire supply chain starting from plasma core plantations to third party supplier partners. second skt no development in areas with high conservation value hcv third no burning and fourth reducing greenhouse gas emissions grk in plantations areas with high conservation value hcv are areas in a landscape that have uniqueness or very significant importance in the context of biological, ecological hydrological and socio-cultural astra agro which is committed to no deforestation has completed an updated assessment of nkt areas in all its operational areas as part of efforts to realize sustainable governance of oil palm plantations while still considering conservation aspects Biodiversity and ecological function, this rigorous activity process involves collaboration with well-known independent institutions such as Daemeter Consulting, Pili Green Network and Eco Nusantara, as well as most importantly the local community of Bandung. Sahari emphasized that this HCV assessment is a scientific and participatory basis for landscape-based biodiversity management. Active community participation is the key to long-term success. Through participatory mapping and in-depth consultation, we build a sense of shared ownership which is essential for conservation effectiveness. He said this process is important for Astra Agro so that all stakeholders have the opportunity to be involved in assessment activities including adequate information exchange on mapping. participatory and final consultation of these activities as a form of respect for the local community, providing information on the study plan and requesting approval for the Bandung Sahari study, adding the sustainability policy reflects the company's long, continuous journey to implement sustainable practices through conserving soil and water biodiversity, reducing the effects of greenhouse gases and creating a conducive environment for internal and surrounding communities. We realize that the sustainability of the palm oil sector is a collective responsibility. Astra Agro's zero deforestation commitment is not just a momentary reaction but a foundation that we have built and maintained over the years to ensure that operational activities can provide benefits to local communities without sacrificing the environment, said Bandung

Isi Berita Clean: Dalam upaya meningkatkan ketahanan pangan nasional, PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk mengembangkan strategi intensifikasi lahan perkebunan sawit melalui peremajaan tanaman dan pengembangan tanaman pangan. Menurut Fenny Sofyan, Vice President Investor Relation and Public Affairs Astra Agro Lestari, perusahaan memanfaatkan bibit unggul untuk peremajaan sawit dan melakukan penanaman padi serta jagung guna mendukung program swasembada pangan. Langkah ini diambil karena permintaan global terhadap Crude Palm Oil (CPO) mencapai 80,3 juta ton, sehingga perusahaan berupaya untuk memaksimalkan produksi dan menjaga keseimbangan pasokan pangan di dalam negeri.

Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk Aali is making efforts to intensify oil palm plantation land by rejuvenating plants and developing food crops to support the food self-sufficiency program. Vice President of Investor Relations and Public Affairs Astra Agro Lestari Fenny Sofyan said the company uses superior seeds in rejuvenating palm oil and planting rice and corn to support the food self-sufficiency target. Astra Agro is making plantation intensification efforts to maintain domestic food security because global market demand for CPO has reached 80.3 million tons. Global palm oil production was only 79.3 million tonnes last year, Fenny said in Jakarta Thursday to rejuvenate plantations, adding that she had used superior seeds developed by the Astra Agro Research and Development team in collaboration with the National Research and Innovation Agency, Brin. Apart from that, she also collaborated with the University of Potsdam, Germany, University of Newcastle, England, and other universities in Indonesia to develop superior palm oil seeds, Astra Agro. With Brin, she developed tissue culture techniques as a clonal method for quality palm oil seeds capable of increasing Palm oil productivity can increase by 20-25 percent compared to conventional plants, while the planting of superior clones resulting from tissue culture has reached more than 10,000 plants located in one of the Astra Agro oil palm plantations in Central Kalimantan. Apart from that, the R D team has launched three superior varieties of plants that will provide better productivity with the names Aal Nirmala, Aal Sejahtera and Aal Sustainable. Meanwhile, to support Fenny's continued food security program, the company is planting upland rice covering an area of 100 hectares in Cianjur and planting corn simultaneously in all operational areas since the beginning of this year. On the same occasion, Fenny stated that the company implemented a commitment not to develop new areas to conserve peatlands while respecting human rights as a sustainable plantation policy. This is in line with the Astra Agro Sustainability Aspiration 2030 which adheres to no deforestation, no peat, no exploitation, NDPE as one of the sustainability policies implemented by the company since 2015, he said.

Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk Aali is making efforts to intensify oil palm plantation land by rejuvenating plants and developing food crops to support the food self-sufficiency program. Vice President of Investor Relations and Public Affairs Astra Agro Lestari Fenny Sofyan said the company uses superior seeds in rejuvenating palm oil and planting rice and corn to support the food self-sufficiency target. Astra Agro is making plantation intensification efforts to maintain domestic food security because global market demand for CPO has reached 80.3 million tons. Global palm oil production was only 79.3 million tonnes last year, Fenny said in Jakarta Thursday to rejuvenate plantations, adding that she had used superior seeds developed by the Astra Agro Research and Development team in collaboration with the National Research and Innovation Agency, Brin. Apart from that, she also collaborated with the University of Potsdam, Germany, University of Newcastle, England, and other universities in Indonesia to develop superior palm oil seeds, Astra Agro. With Brin, she developed tissue culture techniques as a clonal method for quality palm oil seeds capable of increasing Palm oil productivity can increase by 20-25 percent compared to conventional plants, while the planting of superior clones resulting from tissue culture has reached more than 10,000 plants located in one of the Astra Agro oil palm plantations in Central Kalimantan. Apart from that, the R D team has launched three superior varieties of plants that will provide better productivity with the names Aal Nirmala, Aal Sejahtera and Aal Sustainable. Meanwhile, to support Fenny's continued food security program, the company is planting upland rice covering an area of 100 hectares in Cianjur and planting corn simultaneously in all operational areas since the beginning of this year. On the same occasion, Fenny stated that the company implemented a commitment not to develop new areas to conserve peatlands while respecting human rights as a sustainable plantation policy. This is in line with the Astra Agro Sustainability Aspiration 2030 which adheres to no deforestation, no peat, no exploitation, NDPE as one of the sustainability policies implemented by the company since 2015, he said.

Teks_English: tempo interactive the attorney general's office decided to stop investigating the alleged corruption case of taking over assets of PT Kiani Kertas at Bank Mandiri. The order to stop the SP3 investigation of the case was issued on June 1 2011. SP3 in the name of the suspect, former main director of Bank Mandiri, Edward Cornellis, William Neloe, former Deputy Director of Bank Mandiri, I Wayan Pugeg and former director of risk management, M Sholeh Tasripan, said the Director of Special Criminal Investigations at the Attorney General's Office, Jasman Panjaitan, Wednesday, July 6 2011. Jasman revealed that the sp3 of the case which was originally suspected to have cost the state IDR 1.8 trillion was signed by the head of the investigating prosecutor team, Andi Lolo. The case, which had been investigated since 2007, was stopped because it was based on a suggestion from a number of prosecutors in a case title or exposé which was attended by the leadership of the Attorney General's Office after being exposed. In essence, in this case there was no loss to the state considering that the credit had been taken over by another company, said Jasman. After it was taken over by another company and repaid on October 26 2007, Bank Mandiri was called even collected IDR 654 billion. As for the fate of the investigation of other debtors, Jasman admitted that he did not know that a number of debtors who were also being investigated were PT Lativi Media by PT Great River International and PT Artha Bhama Texindo. Until now there is only one, PT Kiani Kertas. His account is that the case started when Bank Mandiri disbursed credit to several companies such as PT Cipta Graha Nusantara, CGN PT Kiani Paper, PT Lativi Media by PT Great River International and PT Artha Bhama Texindo in the PT CGN case, a number of officials have been found guilty by the court, namely the main commissioner Syaiful and the main director of Edison and the financial director, Diman Ponijan, as well as three directors of Bank Mandiri who have been sentenced by the Supreme Court to ten years in prison for giving PT CGN credit worth IDR 160 billion on September 13 2007. The three defendants are being held at the Cipinang Penitentiary. Isi Berita Clean: Asian Agri, salah satu perusahaan kelapa sawit terkemuka di Indonesia, menegaskan komitmennya untuk meningkatkan praktik pertanian yang berkelanjutan dengan menargetkan sertifikasi Indonesian Sustainable Palm Oil (ISPO) bagi semua petani mitra pada tahun 2025. Menurut Leonardo Yapardi, Sustainability Manager Asian Agri, petani kelapa sawit memainkan peran kunci dalam mencapai keberlanjutan perusahaan, sehingga upaya sertifikasi ini merupakan langkah penting untuk memastikan praktik pertanian yang ramah lingkungan. Hingga tahun 2024, perusahaan telah melakukan berbagai upaya untuk meningkatkan kemampuan petani mitra dalam menghasilkan minyak sawit berkelanjutan, dan dengan target sertifikasi ISPO, Asian Agri berharap dapat meningkatkan kontribusinya pada keberlanjutan lingkungan di Indonesia.

Teks_English: Asian Agri, one of the palm oil companies in Indonesia, stated its commitment to certify all partner farmers with the Indonesian Sustainable Palm Oil IPO certificate or Indonesian sustainable palm oil certificate in 2025. Asian Agri sustainability manager Leonardo Yapardi said that oil palm farmers play an important role in the company's sustainability, therefore we have a commitment to certify all partner farmers with Indonesian sustainable palm oil certification in 2025, he said in a statement in Jakarta, Saturday to 2024, he continued, the company has helped 11 kud obtain IPO certification or the equivalent of 49 percent of the target and his party continues to encourage kud to start the certification process in accordance with government policy regarding IPO obligations in 2025. Meanwhile he added that the company has also conducted vocational training for more than 1,700 people supporting the formation of MSMEs in 54 villages out of a total of 159 villages around operational areas located in North Sumatra, Riau and Jambi. Leo stated that Asian Agri will continue carrying out a series of programs and initiatives in collaboration with related parties to ensure the achievement of sustainability targets in 2030. we are optimistic that we can achieve all these targets in the next five years, he said previously, Director of Corporate Affairs RGE Palm Business Johan Kurniawan emphasized that Asian Agri and Apical's sustainability commitment is in line with the UN UNSDGS sustainable development guidelines. He said that the strategic value of palm oil commodities is a key element of the national economy, starting from foreign exchange contribution to providing employment opportunities. The presence of the palm oil industry is an integral part of efforts to improve the welfare of smallholder farmers, especially those who are part of the Partnership and Intiplasma programs. As a producer and processor of palm oil, Asian Agri and Apical operates by prioritizing responsible sustainable principles so that the products produced are beneficial, he said, as part of a series towards a sustainable palm oil industry. He said that in 2022, Asian Agri launched a long-term commitment and strategy that focuses on four main pillars, namely partnership with farmers, inclusive growth, positive climate and responsible and sustainable production. After two years running, several targets on the pillar of partnership with farmers and the pillar of inclusive growth have developed very well as expected, he said. Meanwhile, sustainability manager Apical Hendra. Hosea said that entering the third year of apical 2030, it had recorded several positive progress towards its targets in the pillar of inclusive progress, it had reached 12 villages in Aceh Singkil and three villages in East Kutai from the target of 30 villages for the Sustainable Living Villages SLV program or sustainable villages, apart from empowering the community to reduce poverty and encourage inclusion, Slv added that SLV also encouraged farmers to have alternative income such as trigona honey cultivation in Aceh Singkil and cocoa cultivation in East Kutai. Through the SLV program we are committed to helping independent farmers in realizing Hendra continued, one of the sustainable palm oil plantations is through training in gardening methods that are in accordance with sustainable principles so that farmers get STDB cultivation registration certificates and access to development facilities from the government, which are the basis for ISPO and RSPO. Positive progress can also be seen from the target of support for 5,000 independent farmers to obtain Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil RSPO certification by 2030. To achieve this target, the Smile Smallholder Inclusion for Better Livelihood Empowerment program was launched in 2020, focusing on increasing productivity, increasing income and RSPO certification. Until now, Smile has been involved. 3,489 independent farmers, of which 1,373 farmers have achieved RSPO certification

Teks_English: Wilmar Group, through its subsidiary PT Agrindo Indah Persada AIP, provided assistance to 1,741 independent oil palm farmers in their efforts to obtain a sustainable palm oil certificate or IPO Indonesia Sustainable Palm Oil thereby improving the welfare of farmers. Perkasa Cooperative Manager Nalo Tantan KPNT, Merangin Regency, Jambi. Ahmad Fahmi said the company had assisted cooperative members in obtaining IPO certificates since 2017 and in 2019, the company succeeded in achieving the mandatory certificate. accompanied us from the start, from preparing administration, building and training, supporting financing until we achieved the IPO certificate, he said by telephone in Jakarta, Tuesday. This made KPNT the first independent farmer cooperative in Jambi to obtain an ISP certificate and to date has maintained the IPO certificate for four consecutive years. According to Ahmad Fahmi, PT AIP has now assisted 909 KPNT member farmers with a land area of 3,328 hectares. KPNT, he said, is also a farmer cooperative. The first self-help company in Indonesia to receive grant funds from the government amounting to IDR 3.3 billion and one excavator unit worth IDR 1.8 billion in the facilities and infrastructure program of the oil palm plantation fund management agency BPDPKS. Meanwhile, the chairman of the Tanjung Sehati Sehati Semut Cooperative, KTSL, Merangin Regency, Jalal Sayuti, added that there was a positive impact from the company's assistance which has been carried out since 2022. an understanding of the sales price difference scheme for TBS fresh fruit bunches with assistance from our company can fulfill sustainable principles so that it has an impact on farmers' welfare, he said. Currently there are 832 KTSL members and have succeeded in obtaining IPO certification in 2022 with an oil palm plantation area of 1,355 ha. According to the TBS Purchasing Manager, PT AIP Junaedi, his party has implemented a transparent, fair treatment price scheme for independent farmer cooperatives that have been IPO and non-ISPO certified. In this scheme, a quality-based price scheme has also been implemented. Apart from that, TBS also guarantees long-term FFB revenue for farmers through a mutually beneficial relationship pattern. Menurut Presiden Direktur Astra Agro, Santosa, keberlanjutan bukan hanya sekedar berbisnis, tetapi juga memperhatikan kepedulian kepada masyarakat dan lingkungan sekitar, serta berkontribusi pada kemajuan bersama. Sebagai wujud komitmennya, Astra Agro telah meluncurkan program "Astra Agro Sustainability Aspirations" sejak tahun lalu, yang bertujuan memperkuat komitmen perusahaan terhadap keberlanjutan dan lingkungan. Dengan demikian, Astra Agro berharap dapat memainkan peran aktif dalam mendukung pembangunan berkelanjutan di Indonesia, khususnya dalam aspek lingkungan.

Apart from that, pome residue can be used as organic fertilizer which helps reduce the use of chemical fertilizers. Through simultaneous digital and green transformation, Astra Agro believes that sustainability is not just an environmental program but a company strategy to ensure long-term productivity, operational efficiency and responsible agribusiness growth. Asian Agri sustainability manager Leonardo Yapardi said that oil palm farmers play an important role in the company's sustainability, therefore we have a commitment to certify all partner farmers with Indonesian sustainable palm oil certification in 2025, he said in a statement in Jakarta, Saturday to 2024, he continued, the company has helped 11 kud obtain IPO certification or the equivalent of 49 percent of the target and his party continues to encourage kud to start the certification process in accordance with government policy regarding IPO obligations in 2025. Meanwhile he added that the company has also conducted vocational training for more than 1,700 people supporting the formation of MSMEs in 54 villages out of a total of 159 villages around operational areas located in North Sumatra, Riau and Jambi. Leo stated that Asian Agri will continue carrying out a series of programs and initiatives in collaboration with related parties to ensure the achievement of sustainability targets in 2030. we are optimistic that we can achieve all these targets in the next five years, he said previously, Director of Corporate Affairs RGE Palm Business Johan Kurniawan emphasized that Asian Agri and Apical's sustainability commitment is in line with the UN UNSDGS sustainable development guidelines. He said that the strategic value of palm oil commodities is a key element of the national economy, starting from foreign exchange contribution to providing employment opportunities. The presence of the palm oil industry is an integral part of efforts to improve the welfare of smallholder farmers, especially those who are part of the Partnership and Intiplasma programs. As a producer and processor of palm oil, Asian Agri and Apical operates by prioritizing responsible sustainable principles so that the products produced are beneficial, he said, as part of a series towards a sustainable palm oil industry. He said that in 2022, Asian Agri launched a long-term commitment and strategy that focuses on four main pillars, namely partnership with farmers, inclusive growth, positive climate and responsible and sustainable production. After two years running, several targets on the pillar of partnership with farmers and the pillar of inclusive growth have developed very well as expected, he said. Meanwhile, sustainability manager Apical Hendra. Hosea said that entering the third year of apical 2030, it had recorded several positive progress towards its targets in the pillar of inclusive progress, it had reached 12 villages in Aceh Singkil and three villages in East Kutai from the target of 30 villages for the Sustainable Living Villages SLV program or sustainable villages, apart from empowering the community to reduce poverty and encourage inclusion, Slv added that SLV also encouraged farmers to have alternative income such as trigona honey cultivation in Aceh Singkil and cocoa cultivation in East Kutai. Positive progress can also be seen from the target of support for 5,000 independent farmers to obtain Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil RSPO certification by 2030. To achieve this target, the Smile Smallholder Inclusion for Better Livelihood Empowerment program was launched in 2020, focusing on increasing productivity, increasing income and RSPO certification. Teks_English: event info a big brand claims to have a sustainable certificate and its products are environmentally friendly but the product waste turns out to be polluting the river. Another company claims its product packaging can be recycled but in reality the materials used do not meet recycling standards. The two cases above are greenwashing or the practice of polishing a company's image to make it look environmentally friendly. A number of companies get good ratings in an ESG environmental social and governance ranking even though the practice in the field is different. Scroll down to continue reading this ad. This is what differentiates the Instar sustainable business integration index from the ESG ranking in general. Other ESGs have a jury that determines the winner, while in Instar the role of the jury is replaced by the Instar ESG ranking methodology which was initiated by Tempo Data Science TDS Transparency International Indonesia TII and Institute for Strategic Initiatives Content prioritizes methodology as the main assessor according to the Secretary General of TII Danang Widoyoko. The ESG ranking determined by the jury has two weaknesses, namely the aspect of subjectivity and transparency behind the decision. Often the decision by the jury on an ESG ranking cannot be contested while Instar provides an opportunity. to companies that are assessed to provide feedback in the verification stage which will take place during the period 8 October-29 November 2025. If the company does not agree with our assessment, please correct it. This will at the same time serve as education for companies to improve themselves, said Danang Widoyoko. Instar 2025 will extend the dialogue or feedback process because this year the initial stage of the assessment was attended by 900 companies, while those who reached the threshold value and passed the verification stage reached 479 companies in a number of ESG rankings. Participating companies must register themselves. First of all, the companies then submit their respective ESG programs to the organizers for competition, while the ESG ranking on Instar is not a competition because all public companies listed on the Indonesian Stock Exchange BEI are eligible to be assessed by Instar objectively assessing four components, namely the annual report, the company's code of ethics and a number of related documents. trying to make the company into the green or environmentally good category but ignoring the problem of corruption or labor conflicts, respect for human rights, cultural traditions, health and safety, K3 and other social aspects, therefore we are of the view that Instar must provide an equal assessment for the three aspects with more complete indicators, said the director of TDS, Philips Parera, Isi Berita Clean: Dalam upaya meningkatkan kesadaran masyarakat akan pentingnya pelestarian lingkungan, PT Mentaya Sawit Mas Wilmar di Kalimantan Tengah melalui Project Forendadi Dundang melakukan sosialisasi secara menyeluruh, baik melalui jalur formal maupun informal, untuk membangkitkan partisipasi warga dalam menjaga area konservasi yang memiliki nilai tinggi. Tujuan dari pelibatan masyarakat ini adalah untuk menciptakan hubungan yang harmonis antara perusahaan dan masyarakat sekitar, sehingga jika terjadi masalah, dapat diselesaikan dengan cara kekeluargaan.
clean_text: senior conservation pt mentaya sawit mas wilmar central kalimantan project forendadi dundang mengatakan guna menumbuhkan kepedulian warga pihaknya tengah aktif melakukan sosialisasi baik secara formal maupun informal tujuannya adalah agar warga b ersedia ikut menjaga areal konservasi bernilai tinggi high conservation value hcv yang dikelola perusahaan selain itu pelibatan masyarakat juga bertujuan agar hubungan masyarakat dan perusahaan semakin harmonis kalau hubungan kita baik kalau ada masalah bisa diselesaikan dengan kekeluargaan kata forendadi dalam keterangan tertulis jumat 10 3 2023. dia menambahkan saat ini sudah ada lima desa binaan yang aktif didatanginya untuk sosialisasi yaitu desa baampah desa kawan batu desa tanjung bantur desa tenda durian dan desa pahirangan sosialisasi ini dilakukan satu tahun sekali untuk warga dan setahun dua kali untuk karyawan sosialisasi ini dilakukan secara tatap muka melalui pembagian leaflet dan juga pemutaran video mengenai pentingnya menjaga kelestarian hutan forendadi menuturkan dirinya bersama tim konservasi juga rutin melakukan sosialisasi ke sekolah sekolah sosialisasi ini bertujuan untuk memperkenalkan dan mengajak siswa peduli terhadap hutan sejak dini dia menjelaskan saat ini pihaknya telah mengantongi izin memberikan edukasi konservasi kepada murid sekolah dasar sd pada pelaksanaan tahap awal edukasi siswa akan diajak melihat video di kelas dan selanjutnya melakukan kunjungan ke kawasan konservasi mulai tahun ini kata forendadi pihaknya telah menyiapkan edukasi melalui permainan agar lebih atraktif materi edukasi disesuaikan dengan kemampuan siswa misalnya soal satwa liar dan jenis jenis pohon setiap kelas memiliki materi yang berbeda ucap forendadi untuk jangka panjang tim konservasi juga telah mempersiapkan program edukasi hingga jenjang sekolah menengah atas sma program ini juga telah memperoleh sambutan hangat dari pemerintah desa karena dinilai positif selain itu edukasi juga dilakukan bukan hanya untuk menjaga lingkungan hutan tetapi juga mengkampanyekan pencegahan kebakaran hutan dan lahan suka dan duka forendadi ajak masyarakat jaga hutan lebih lanjut forendadi mengatakan hutan adalah sumber daya alam berharga dan memiliki dampak besar jika dijaga dengan baik karena menghasilkan sesuatu yang tidak dapat dinilai dengan uang seperti oksigen dan air meski dilindungi warga sekitar kawasan konservasi tetap diizinkan mengambil rotan madu dan ikan dengan tetap menjaga kelestariannya inilah yang harus disampaikan ke masyarakat bahwa sekarang kita sedang mengelola sumber daya alam yang berharga ini ujarnya terkait fauna kata forendadi juga berperan penting dalam konservasi jika pemerintah memiliki program penanaman pohon satwa liar juga dapat melakukan hal yang sama orang hutan salah satunya satwa primata itu memakan buah buahan dan mempunyai kemampuan menjelajah hingga 8 km per hari secara tidak langsung mereka dapat menyebarkan benih yang berpotensi tumbuh menjadi pohon baru satwa satwa tersebut dikenal dengan umbrella species yaitu spesies yang dipilih mewakili suatu ekosistem untuk tujuan konservasi melindungi spesies ini secara tidak langsung juga melindungi banyak spesies lain yang membentuk komunitas ekologi habitatnya menurut forendadi untuk mengajak masyarakat peduli hutan memang tidak mudah karena itu perlu pendekatan dengan bahasa yang sama dengan masyarakat sejak itulah awal mula forendadi menerima tawaran sebagai bagian tim konservasi dari pt mentaya sawit mas 13 tahun lalu dia menceritakan pada saat itu perusahaan tengah mencari tim konservasi dari masyarakat lokal meski sudah memiliki ketertarikan terhadap hutan namun saat itu dia tidak begitu saja menerima tawaran karena sedang dicalonkan menjadi kepala desa namun setelah berkonsultasi dengan keluarga dan teman akhirnya dia memilih bergabung dengan perusahaan saya diberikan tool kit mengenai konservasi terus tertarik karena tau fungsinya tidak cuma fokus ke teknologi kita kembali ke alam jelasnya dia mengatakan kesehariannya sebagai pegiat konservasi berbeda 180 derajat dibanding sebelumnya jika menengok ke belakang forendadi pernah menjalani pekerjaan sebagai perambah hutan illegal logger di awal tahun 2.000. pekerjaan itu dilakoninya sekitar tujuh tahun karena hasilnya menggiurkan kendati demikian pekerjaan tersebut juga memiliki tantangan karena dia harus tinggal di hutan hingga berbulan bulan akhirnya dia banting setir karena pemerintah kala itu membuat kebijakan pelarangan perambahan hutan forendadi juga menuturkan menjaga hutan lebih banyak suka dibandingkan dukanya menurutnya suka itu terletak ketika nilai konservasi tersebut meningkat dan sungai tidak ada pencemaran dia pun mengapresiasi komitmen perusahaan dalam upaya konservasi karena selalu mendukung seluruh program yang dilakukan dukanya medannya berat karena berupa hutan alam pungkasnya sementara itu conservation lead wilmar syahrial anhar harahap mengatakan sebagai perusahaan berbasis sumber daya alam yang berkelanjutan wilmar memiliki tanggung jawab untuk turut berkontribusi menjaga lingkungan salah satunya dengan mengelola areal hcv yang berada di dalam perkebunan latar belakang dalam pengelolaan hcv adalah menjaga dan menyesuaikan fungsi fungsi ekosistem ekologi sosial budaya dan juga jasa jasa lingkungan serta keanekaragaman hayati terang anhar sebagai informasi perusahaan agribisnis tersebut kini mengelola areal hcv sekitar 20 ribu hektare ha area hcv terluas yang dikelola berada di kalimantan tengah seluas 15 ribu ha atau 75 persen dari total hcv yang dikelola perusahaan ncm ega hutan wilmar konservasi

Sementara itu, TNI telah melatih peserta Program Beasiswa LPDP yang diikuti oleh anggota DPR, dengan syarat bahwa kegiatan tersebut tidak melanggar aturan dan telah disetujui oleh pemerintah. Strategi ini merupakan bagian dari upaya pemerintah untuk meningkatkan kemampuan dalam menghadapi ekstremisme, yang dipimpin oleh Menteri Pertahanan Prabowo Subianto. Dalam bidang ekonomi, pemerintah telah mengambil tindakan tegas dengan mencopot dua pejabat Kementerian Keuangan karena adanya penyalahgunaan dana restitusi pajak, sehingga menimbulkan kerugian bagi negara. Sementara itu, nilai tukar rupiah terus melemah dan mendekati Rp 17.400 per dolar AS, yang menimbulkan kekhawatiran di kalangan masyarakat.

Isi Berita Clean: Perubahan besar terjadi di perusahaan makanan dan investasi Wilmar International yang berkantor pusat di Singapura, karena manajer umum keberlanjutan grup, Perpetua George, telah meninggalkan perusahaan setelah lebih dari delapan tahun bekerja. Tokoh yang dikenal luas sebagai "Pep" ini berasal dari Malaysia dan telah bergabung dengan firma jasa profesional PwC sebagai spesialis materi yang menangani keanekaragaman hayati, solusi berbasis alam, dan pengungkapan terkait, dengan basis di Kuala Lumpur. Sementara itu, perusahaan komoditas raksasa tersebut telah melakukan restrukturisasi tim keberlanjutan yang dipimpin oleh kepala keberlanjutan.
clean_text: show all news opinion videos and press releases matching international edition the general manager of group sustainability for singapore headquartered food processing and investment holding company wilmar international perpetua george has left th e company after more than eight and a half years widely known in the industry as pep the malaysian has joined professional services firm pwc as a subject matter expert covering biodiversity nature based solutions and related disclosure based in kuala lumpur the commodities giant has restructured its sustainability team led by chief sustainability officer jeremy goon they are daphne hameeteman general manager sustainability external engagement disclosure joshua limgeneral manager sustainability supply chain downstream and edrin moss assistant general manager sustainability upstream operations daphne hameeteman who is wilmar s sustainability lead for europe for the past nine and a half years will start her new role on 1 september and relocate from rotterdam to kuala lumpur wilmar s moves comes as the industry grapples with the implications of the newly introduced european union deforestation regulation eudr which will require commodity producers wilmar is the world s largest palm oil trader to abide by strict new export rules to weed deforestation out of supply chains george said at a recent event that the eudr risked making sustainability certification schemes for palm oil irrelevant hameeteman will oversee wilmar s environmental social and governance esg assessments benchmarking and reporting including the publication of the company s annual sustainability reports she will also oversee the implementation of the firm s sustainability initiatives for non palm commodities including sugar and coconut in recent years hameeteman has participated in dialogues with european policymakers over the eudr including the corporate social due diligence directive which assesses firms on human rights risk and other regulations to represent the interests of the palm oil sector lim is overseeing the firm s third party compliance climate change and commercial engagement while moss is looking after sustainable certification conservation and smallholder partnerships wilmar introduced its no deforestation policy in 2013, and upgraded its ndpe policy in 2018 following protests by environmental activists george joined wilmar from consumer goods firm unilever where she was sustainable sourcing manager renewables and traceability in 2014. she brings 20 years of experience in sustainability strategy to pwc s asia pacific sustainability team having worked for conservation group wwf as forest conservation officer in sabah and responsible agriculture non profit proforest latterly as regional manager she joins pwc as the firm builds out its sustainability function in line with its global the new equation strategy a plan of action the firm announced in july 2021 to help its clients Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk has planted corn simultaneously on the plantations of the Astra Agro Group subsidiaries spread across Sumatra, Kalimantan and Sulawesi to support the 2025 food self-sufficiency program, according to the Vice President of Investor Relations and Public Affairs of Astra Agro, Fenny Sofyan. The company involves the community that lives and settles within the company, namely employees and their families or referred to as communities. So far, we have had community empowerment programs, one of which is food and economic independence. through various activities, he said in his statement in Jakarta, Wednesday. Currently, the palm oil company has 499 associations spread across eight provinces and consists of more than 30,000 heads of families. According to him, they have succeeded in cultivating various types of plants and also processing waste waste into goods of high economic value, thus providing benefits for the progress of their communities. Meanwhile, Astra Agro's vice president of partnership management, Jonet Budiarto, revealed that the simultaneous planting program is in line with the government's target to make Indonesia a world food basket by 2045, by focusing on increasing the production of various strategic food commodities, corn has become one of the leading crops, the potential of corn commodities in contributing to food security and the national economy is very large, he said, not just a food ingredient, corn is known as an important raw material for various downstream industries such as animal feed, flour and other processed foods. Corn is an important source of raw materials for 32 industrial sectors, placing corn as a commodity with the third highest added value in the agricultural sector after rice and oil palm. The land selected has gone through a strict curation process based on established land suitability criteria, said Jonet, who is also responsible for operational implementation of the Astra Agro food self-sufficiency program. In addition to approval obtained from the local agriculture and food department, risk assessments are also carried out by the company's internal team. According to him, this step is to ensure that the food self-sufficiency program is not only productivity-oriented but also pays attention to aspects of environmental sustainability.

seperti tikus dan ular tercatat ada kurang lebih 16 spesies burung pemangsa yang ditemukan di kawasan konservasi ini di antaranya adalah elang kelelawar elang tikus elap alap jambul dan lain lain dalam kunjungan ke area hcv wilmar di kalteng pada rabu 8 2 lalu detikcom juga menyempatkan diri menjajal area ecotrail di kawasan ini adapun ecotrail ini berlokasi di area hcv id msm1idid2-4 blok 015 dan 021. area ini dibuat untuk membantu pemantauan satwa liar pengelolaan area konservasi hingga sarana edukasi bagi anak sekolah dasrial mengungkap sepanjang 2022 lalu pihaknya telah melakukan edukasi untuk sekolah yang menjadi bagian dari yayasan wilmar bina bangsa satu tahun kemarin kita fokus di internal sekolah kita tapi kemarin kita sudah komunikasi dengan pihak desa untuk edukasi mereka senang di sisi lain mereka juga punya tematik yang sesuai kurikulum kita akan ajarkan pentingnya konservasi sejak dini ini terangnya lebih lanjut senior officer conservation pt msm forendadi dundang menjelaskan ada beberapa materi edukasi yang bisa diberikan untuk anak sd mulai dari pengenalan tentang hutan flora dan fauna pengelolaan sampah bahaya kebakaran hutan pihaknya juga kerap melakukan sosialisasi tahunan terjadwal ke desa desa sekitar untuk memberi tahu manfaat konservasi sekaligus memberikan rasa cinta dan kepedulian terhadap lingkungan tak hanya itu wilmar juga melakukan pembuatan sumur bor yang di sebelah embung air ia berfungsi sebagai penyedia air di kala terjadi kebakaran berlanjut ke halaman berikutnya wilmar peduli pendidikan selain memberi perhatian akan pendidikan lewat yayasan wilmar bina bangsa wilmar juga memberikan beasiswa kepada putra putri daerah di sekitar kawasan perkebunan staf accounting meri mengaku dirinya mendapat beasiswa untuk melanjutkan s2. perwakilan ada 5 orang dari desa yang diberikan kesempatan s2. berterima kasih kepada wilmar group yang telah memberikan kesempatan beasiswa s2, sangat bangga sebagai putra putri daerah ucap meri warga desa pondok damar kotawaringin timur ia menceritakan selepas kuliah s1 dirinya bekerja di wilmar pada salah satu pabrik pt mustika sembuluh setelah dua tahun bekerja di pabrik dirinya mendapat kesempatan beasiswa menempuh s2 dan diangkat menjadi staf wilmar juga memberi perhatian pada sekolah di sekitar area perkebunan melalui pembinaan salah satunya kepada smk kertapati di kabupaten seruyan kepala sekolah smk kertapati muhammad fazrin mengaku pihaknya mendapat bantuan pembinaan dari wilmar kalimantan tengah khususnya pt kerry sawit indonesia ksi bantuan ini diberikan untuk membangun smk pusat unggulan di bidang kelapa sawit yang dapat secara mandiri menjual produk unggulan berupa bibit kelapa sawit berkualitas selain itu wilmar juga memberi pembinaan bagi smk kertapati untuk menjadi sekolah agroeduwisata bedah rumah dan perbaikan jalan program bedah rumah juga menjadi salah satu peran wilmar dalam mendukung program kementerian desa pembangunan daerah tertinggal dan transmigrasi untuk memberi rumah layak huni bagi warga desa sekitar adapun wilmar kalimantan tengah memberikan bantuan ini kepada warga sekitar terutama bagi warga kurang mampu penyandang disabilitas dan janda tua program ini telah menjadi prioritas tahunan di wilmar pada tahun 2018-2021, wilmar telah membangun 106 unit rumah bagi warga desa binaan di sekitar kabupaten kotawaringin timur maupun kabupaten seruyan wilmar juga melakukan perbaikan jalan di poros simpang sebabi melalui pt bumi sawit kencana bsk pt karunia kencana permaisejati kkp dan pt mentaya sawit mas msm bersama perusahaan dari luar wilmar group dari 4 perusahaan tersebut terkumpul dana rp 800 juta untuk dilakukan patching pengaspalan pemberdayaan kelompok tani dan petani plasma wilmar kalimantan tengah bekerja sama dengan kelompok tani di sekitar perkebunan salah satunya kelompok tani menabur benih menuai hasil yang berlokasi persis di sebelah perkebunan wilmar estate manager pt mustika sembuluh 1, hendra lubis menerangkan pihaknya resmi berkolaborasi aktif dengan kelompok tani ini sejam 2019. berlanjut ke halaman berikutnya pihaknya memberikan bantuan alat serta bantuan pendampingan untuk kelompok petani yang sudah berdiri sejak tahun 2007 ini sebelumnya ada kerja sama tapi tidak terlalu banyak saat terkena badai covid-19, masyarakat diminta menggalakkan ketahanan pangan kita hadir di sini untuk ikut bekerja sama membantu kelompok tani supaya berkembang lebih baik papar hendra ketua kelompok tani menabur benih menuai hasil suharno menambahkan bantuan dari wilmar membantu kelompoknya bisa bergerak lebih maju ia mengaku sebelumnya kelompok tani ini tak bisa banyak menuai hasil dengan bantuan perusahaan kami bisa bergerak saat mengalami krisis covid kami sudah panen dengan ketahanan pangan jagung dengan bimbingan dari perusahaan pt mustika sembuluh kami tidak kekurangan pangan di sini bantuan luar biasa ada untuk pengerukan tanah tadinya tidak punya air sekarang dibuatkan kolam terang suharno adapun tanah yang dikelola oleh kelompok tani ini merupakan tanah milik subandi luasnya sekitar 30 hektare dengan area yang sudah digarap sebanyak 20 hektare area ini ditanami berbagai sayuran seperti tanaman jagung kacang tanah kacang panjang terong dan lain lain subandi menyambut baik bantuan yang diberikan oleh wilmar ia mengatakan dirinya maupun wilmar tidak menuntut apapun dari petani sehingga para petani penggarap bisa menikmati hasilnya secara bersih subandi berharap kelompok tani ini bisa berkembang lebih maju bahkan bisa menjadi percontohan bagi kelompok tani lainnya di tanah air tak hanya itu wilmar juga menerapkan program plasma di kawasan central kalimantan project salah satunya melalui pt ksi luasan kebun plasma di pt ksi ini mencapai 3.142,62 hektare hak atas kebun plasma telah diterima oleh warga sekitar perkebunan wilmar terutama di kabupaten seruyan kepala desa sembuluh 2, ahmad syukur mengungkapkan kondisi perekonomian warganya semakin sejahtera dengan hadirnya kontribusi dari wilmar salah satunya terlihat dari para warga yang beberapa tahun belakang berbondong bondong pergi umrah ke tanah suci apresiasi juga datang dari pihak koperasi yakni koperasi karya bersama di tanjung rangas seruyan diungkapkan banyak warga yang sebelumnya berprofesi sebagai nelayan beralih pekerjaan menjadi petani plasma sejak adanya program ini pihaknya pun merasa terbantu karena dirangkul oleh pt ksi pola kerja sama antara ksi dengan koperasi mitra kami ada kegiatan rutin per triwulan melakukan pemaparan pengelolaan dan pembiayaan maupun pendapatan dari kebun selain itu kami juga ada pelatihan terhadap pengurus terkait perpajakan dan akuntansi itu merupakan salah satu bentuk transfer knowledge dari pihak inti jelas manager plasma di wilmar kalimantan tengah pupung pamungkas harapannya pengurus koperasi ini juga jauh lebih profesional yang sedang kami tawarkan juga kepada koperasi ialah pelatihan manajemen cashflow pungkasnya

Isi Berita Clean: Insiden ledakan hebat terjadi di tungku smelter PT Indonesia Tsingshan Stainless Steel (ITSS) yang berlokasi di Morowali pada Minggu (24 Desember 2023), menyebabkan kebakaran besar dan mengakibatkan 13 pekerja tewas. Manajemen PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park (IMIP) segera membentuk tim khusus untuk menangani dampak kecelakaan kerja di lokasi pabrik tersebut. Menurut keterangan terbaru hingga pukul 16.15 WITA, situasi di lokasi kejadian telah berhasil dikendalikan. Jumlah korban tewas akibat insiden tersebut dikonfirmasi sebanyak 13 orang, dengan rincian 9 pekerja asal Indonesia dan 4 pekerja asal China, seperti yang dinyatakan oleh Dedy Kurniawan, Kepala Hubungan Media PT IMIP.
clean_text: cnbc indonesia tungku smelter pt indonesia tsingshan stainless steel itss di morowali mengalami ledakan hebat pada minggu 24 12 2023 kecelakaan ini menyebabkan kebakaran hebat dan menewaskan 13 pekerja manajemen pt indonesia morowali industrial park imip telah membentuk tim penanganan dampak kecelakaan kerja di lokasi pabrik hingga pukul 16.15 wita diketahui situasi di lokasi kejadian sudah terkendali dedy kurniawan media relations head pt imip mengonfirmasi jumlah korban meninggal sebanyak 13 orang terdiri atas 9 sembilan pekerja indonesia dan 4 empat pekerja asal china sementara itu sebanyak 46 korban terluka umumnya disebabkan karena terkena uap panas sebanyak 29 korban luka telah dirujuk ke rsud morowali 12 orang sedang dilakukan observasi oleh klinik imip dan 5 lima orang rawat jalan manajemen pt imip telah menanggung seluruh biaya perawatan dan perawatan korban pascakecelakaan serta santunan bagi keluarga korban kami juga telah menyerahkan 1 satu jenazah korban kepada keluarga korban ujarnya dalam keterangan tertulis minggu 24 12 2023. kronologi kecelakaan di smelter insiden tragis ini bermula ketika tungku smelter no 41 yang terbakar awalnya masih ditutup untuk operasi pemeliharaan saat tungku tersebut sedang tidak beroperasi dan dalam proses perbaikan terdapat sisa slag atau terak dalam tungku yang keluar lalu bersentuhan dengan barang barang yang mudah terbakar di lokasi dinding tungku lalu runtuh dan sisa terak besi mengalir keluar sehingga menyebabkan kebakaran akibatnya pekerja yang berada di lokasi mengalami luka luka hingga korban jiwa hasil identifikasi penyebab kecelakaan ini sekaligus menegaskan bahwa tidak ada tabung oksigen yang meledak seperti diinformasikan sebelumnya dedy menyebut saat ini tim pt imip tengah berkoordinasi dengan pihak terkait antara lain safety tenant satuan pengamanan objek vital nasional pam obvitnas kawasan imip polda sulawesi tengah danrem tadulako dan jajaran pemerintah kecamatan bahodopi dan kabupaten morowali
Teks_English: CNBC Indonesia PT Indonesia Tsingshan Stainless Steel ITS Smelter Furnace in Morowali experienced a severe explosion on Sunday 24 12 2023. This accident caused a severe fire and killed 13 workers. Management of PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park IMIP has formed a team to handle the impact of work accidents at the factory location. Until 16.15 WIT, it was discovered that the situation at the scene of the incident was under control. Dedy Kurniawan Media Relations Head PT IMIP confirmed the number of victims who died was 13 people. consisting of 9 nine Indonesian workers and 4 four workers from China. Meanwhile, 46 injured victims were generally caused by exposure to hot steam. 29 injured victims have been referred to the Morowali Hospital. 12 people are being observed by the IMIP clinic and 5 five people are outpatients. PT IMIP management has covered all costs for post-accident care and treatment of victims as well as compensation for the victim's family. We have also handed over 1 victim's body to the victim's family, he said in a written statement on Sunday 24 12 2023. The chronology of the accident at the smelter, this tragic incident began when the burning furnace of Smelter No. 41 was initially still closed for maintenance operations when the furnace was not operating and during the repair process there was residual slag or slag in the furnace which came out and then came into contact with flammable items at the location of the furnace wall then collapsed and the remaining iron slag flowed out, causing a fire as a result of which workers at the location suffered injuries and even fatalities. The results of identifying the cause of this accident also confirmed that there were no oxygen cylinders that exploded as previously informed. Dedy said that currently the PT IMIP team was in the middle of coordinating with related parties, including safety tenants, national vital object security unit, pam obvitnas, imip area, central sulawesi police, danrem tadulako and government officials in bahodopi subdistrict and morowali regency

Isi Berita Clean: Dalam upaya meningkatkan kemampuan para petani sawit dan meningkatkan produktivitas serta kesejahteraan mereka, Akademi Komunitas Perkebunan (AKPY) bekerja sama dengan Direktorat Jenderal Perkebunan (Ditjenbun) dan didukung oleh Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan (BPDP) menyelenggarakan pelatihan khusus bagi petani sawit di wilayah Sumatera Selatan. Pelatihan tersebut mencakup dua program utama, yaitu pelatihan teknis budidaya kelapa sawit dan pelatihan manajemen serta administrasi keuangan, yang diikuti oleh 144 petani sawit dari dua kabupaten di Sumatera Selatan, dengan rincian 60 orang dari Muara Enim dan 84 orang dari Musi Rawa.

Teks_English: Palembang in improving the competence of oil palm farmers and encouraging increased productivity and welfare. The Akpy Plantation Community Academy again held training for oil palm farmers. The training itself was supported by the BPDP plantation fund management body in collaboration with the Directorate General of Plantations, Directorate General of Plantation. On that occasion there were two types of training, namely technical oil palm cultivation and financial management and administration which was attended by 144 oil palm farmers from two districts in South Sumatra, South Sumatra, namely 60 people from Muara Enim and 84 people from Musi Rawas Utara, Director of Akpy. from Sri Gunawan SP MP said that this training activity was a synergy between the Directorate General of Plantations and BPDP in order to implement the human resources development program for oil palm plantations, especially for farmers. The aim of the training for oil palm farmers, among others, was to provide insight and insight into how to cultivate sustainable oil palm, good management practices, especially technical cultivation of oil palm plants, as well as increasing knowledge of managerial independence and entrepreneurial skills that are competitive in sustainable oil palm plantations, he said, Thursday 8 5 2025 in Palembang. Sri Gunawan said the training directly involved the participants. These farmers are to provide understanding and open up knowledge regarding the various problems faced by the palm oil sector currently, there are several obstacles being faced, including old oil palm plants, uncertified seeds, 93 million palm oil seeds, equivalent to 465,000 ha a year, 3.2 million ha over the last 7 years, climate change, groundwater problems, temperature, poor maintenance, especially insufficient fertilization and the problem of fruit theft and land legality problems, he said. He said that he hopes that with this training, farmers will have increased technical skills in oil palm cultivation, be skilled at applying the knowledge they have gained and can pass it on to other farmers so that production increased and a plantation clinic was established and was able to form and manage good finances and administration, a healthy and independent institution continued Sri Gunawan, technically the training was carried out for 5 days 7 11 May 2025, divided into five classes of material delivered by garden practitioners and academics according to their fields. Apart from that, the participants were also scheduled to carry out comparative studies to plantations managed by the Sampoerna Agro plantation company related to the PKS human resource development program which was realized by training the head of the South Sumatra provincial plantation service, Ir Agus Darwa M Si expressed that his party welcomed the implementation of the training activities which were attended by oil palm farmers from Muara Enim and Musi Rawas Utara districts. This was the right step to educate oil palm farmers. Even though the farmers had planted and managed oil palm plants but the techniques for planting and managing them were not necessarily correct, through their training activities, oil palm farmers could manage oil palm plantations properly and correctly so that productivity could increase and develop useful and sustainable oil palm plantations. It was clear that by attending the training the participants would not only know the knowledge but would be able to practice it in their respective plantations in accordance with procedures. or the knowledge gained during the training on the same occasion, the head of the North Musi Rawas Regency Agriculture and Fisheries Service, Ade Meiri Siswani Sp MP, added that he was proud that the government's training program could be attended by oil palm farmers from North Musi Rawas Regency. In this training, there were 84 oil palm farmers who took part in technical training on oil palm cultivation. This is the first opportunity for oil palm farmers from North Musi Rawas Regency to take part in training, so we hope that this opportunity can be used well so that the knowledge gained during the training can be put into practice and transmitted to other oil palm farmers, he concluded.

tahun 2013, dan secara rutin hingga tahun ini kami juga terus menerima premi tersebut ujar sudiyono ia juga menjelaskan dari premi yang diterima akan digunakan untuk kegiatan penguatan kelompok dan anton ia juga menekankan pentingnya menggunakan bibit unggul topaz dari asian agri saat melakukan replanting yang terbukti dapat meningkatkan produktivitas hingga 28 ton ha pada tahun ketiga tanaman kehilangan pendapatannya selama masa replanting karena berbagai kemudahan telah diberikan baik dari pemerintah yaitu dana bpdpks maupun dari asian agri berupa pemanfaatan dana premium sharing untuk persiapan pendapatan alternatif seperti beternak ayam kampung organic sehingga petani tetap memiliki penghasilan selama masa tunggu sementara itu pada penyerahan dana premium 2023, sekretaris kud pinjaman petani dan bahkan membantu kami agar tetap memiliki penghasilan selama masa replanting melalui pendapatan alternatif dengan dukungan mitra replanting berjalan dengan baik dan tepat waktu saya yakin replanting dengan pola kemitraan adalah solusi terbaik bagi petani ujar rahadi komitmen asian agri head of partnership asian agri rudy rismanto mengatakan kemitraan merupakan salah satu strategi Teks_English: Palembang in improving the competence of oil palm farmers and encouraging increased productivity and welfare. The Akpy Plantation Community Academy again held training for oil palm farmers. The training itself was supported by the BPDP plantation fund management body in collaboration with the Directorate General of Plantations, Directorate General of Plantation. On that occasion there were two types of training, namely technical oil palm cultivation and financial management and administration which was attended by 144 oil palm farmers from two districts in South Sumatra, South Sumatra, namely 60 people from Muara Enim and 84 people from Musi Rawas Utara, Director of Akpy. from Sri Gunawan SP MP said that this training activity was a synergy between the Directorate General of Plantations and BPDP in order to implement the human resources development program for oil palm plantations, especially for farmers. The aim of the training for oil palm farmers, among others, was to provide insight and insight into how to cultivate sustainable oil palm, good management practices, especially technical cultivation of oil palm plants, as well as increasing knowledge of managerial independence and entrepreneurial skills that are competitive in sustainable oil palm plantations, he said, Thursday 8 5 2025 in Palembang. Sri Gunawan said the training directly involved the participants. These farmers are to provide understanding and open up knowledge regarding the various problems faced by the palm oil sector currently, there are several obstacles being faced, including old oil palm plants, uncertified seeds, 93 million palm oil seeds, equivalent to 465,000 ha a year, 3.2 million ha over the last 7 years, climate change, groundwater problems, temperature, poor maintenance, especially insufficient fertilization and the problem of fruit theft and land legality problems, he said. He said that he hopes that with this training, farmers will have increased technical skills in oil palm cultivation, be skilled at applying the knowledge they have gained and can pass it on to other farmers so that production increased and a plantation clinic was established and was able to form and manage good finances and administration, a healthy and independent institution continued Sri Gunawan, technically the training was carried out for 5 days 7 11 May 2025, divided into five classes of material delivered by garden practitioners and academics according to their fields. Apart from that, the participants were also scheduled to carry out comparative studies to plantations managed by the Sampoerna Agro plantation company related to the PKS human resource development program which was realized by training the head of the South Sumatra provincial plantation service, Ir Agus Darwa M Si expressed that his party welcomed the implementation of the training activities which were attended by oil palm farmers from Muara Enim and Musi Rawas Utara districts. This was the right step to educate oil palm farmers. Even though the farmers had planted and managed oil palm plants but the techniques for planting and managing them were not necessarily correct, through their training activities, oil palm farmers could manage oil palm plantations properly and correctly so that productivity could increase and develop useful and sustainable oil palm plantations. It was clear that by attending the training the participants would not only know the knowledge but would be able to practice it in their respective plantations in accordance with procedures. or the knowledge gained during the training on the same occasion, the head of the North Musi Rawas Regency Agriculture and Fisheries Service, Ade Meiri Siswani Sp MP, added that he was proud that the government's training program could be attended by oil palm farmers from North Musi Rawas Regency. In this training, there were 84 oil palm farmers who took part in technical training on oil palm cultivation. This is the first opportunity for oil palm farmers from North Musi Rawas Regency to take part in training, so we hope that this opportunity can be used well so that the knowledge gained during the training can be put into practice and transmitted to other oil palm farmers, he concluded.

Isi Berita Clean: POSCO International Corp, anak perusahaan perdagangan dari POSCO Group asal Korea Selatan, telah mengakuisisi Sampoerna Agro, produsen minyak sawit Indonesia, dalam transaksi yang bernilai sekitar 1,3 triliun won atau setara dengan Rp14,8 triliun. Dengan melakukan investasi pada Rabu, perusahaan tersebut berhasil memperoleh saham pengendali di Sampoerna Agro, sehingga menjadi pemegang saham terbesar di perusahaan yang tercatat di Bursa Efek Jakarta tersebut. Akuisisi ini merupakan langkah strategis POSCO International untuk memperluas bisnis biofuel globalnya, sebagaimana disampaikan dalam laporan keuangan perusahaan.

Teks_English: Seoul South Korean company Posco International Corp. Posco Group's trading division Thursday announced the acquisition of Indonesian palm oil producer Sampoerna Agro in a deal worth 1.3 trillion won, around IDR 14.8 trillion to expand its global biofuel business. Posco International invested to acquire a controlling stake in Sampoerna Agro on Wednesday 19 11, thus becoming the largest shareholder of the Jakarta company listed on the stock exchange. According to a financial report submitted by the South Korean company, the company described the acquisition as: strategic investment step to strengthen its global palm oil value chain Sampoerna Agro operates oil palm plantations throughout the islands of Sumatra and Kalimantan in Indonesia and has a large subsidiary engaged in seed production and an agricultural research institute. entered the palm oil business in 2011 and currently operates three palm oil factories in Papua, Indonesia with a production capacity of around 210,000 tons of palm oil per year

Isi Berita Clean: Penerapan konsep Environmental Social and Governance (ESG) dalam berbagai lini bisnis saat ini tengah berkembang pesat, sehingga memicu maraknya praktik pelaporan ESG oleh perusahaan. Namun, di balik praktik pelaporan ini, ternyata banyak yang tidak transparan dan jujur. Praktik greenwashing atau pemalsuan laporan ESG yang dilakukan oleh beberapa entitas bisnis untuk memperoleh citra positif di mata publik menjadi fenomena yang cukup meresahkan. Menurut data dari Reprisk yang dikutip oleh Sanjung Purnama Budiarjo, Peneliti Kelompok Spesialis Riset dan Widyaiswara OJK Institute, kasus greenwashing paling banyak terjadi di Eropa pada tahun 2023.

Teks_English: PT Adaro Minerals Indonesia Tbk ADMR denies carrying out greenwashing in producing environmentally friendly mineral derivative products in the form of aluminum. President Director of Adaro Minerals Indonesia, Christian Ariano Rachmat, emphasized that the company does not carry out greenwashing practices. This accusation was only made because Adaro uses coal power to operate the aluminum smelter factory later, even though the condition is only temporary until the hydroelectric power plant is completed. Scroll down to continue reading our ad. "It's not greenwashing. It's clear that we are saying, why is this aluminum plant going to be built from coal, why from coal, because hydro will only be ready in 2030," said Ariano in a press conference on Wednesday 10 May 2023. Previously, the Financial Times stated that in building this smelter, Adaro experienced difficulties in getting funding from international banks. These difficulties came when a number of environmental groups said that Adaro and its partner, namely Hyundai, were carrying out greenwashing, while greenwashing is a marketing strategy carried out by the company in order to build an environmentally friendly image aimed at form a consumer perception that the company has promoted sustainable products even though this has not been done. Ariano further firmly denies greenwashing and explains that in aluminum production the company will make a transition before producing green aluminum using hydroelectric power. To achieve that, green aluminum still needs the main process, the main process is to wait for the completion of the construction of the Mentarang hydroelectric power plant while waiting for the hydroelectric power plant. China also still produces aluminum using coal. Anyway, the imported aluminum that is currently used is also bought from China. In China, it is made using coal. In the past, we didn't lie to people who said that this is green aluminum, but there will be steps to green aluminum later. According to him, what Adaro is doing is not breaking the rules, especially since the use of coal is only temporary. Meanwhile, Adaro Minerals, through its subsidiary which controls shares in PT Kalimantan Aluminum, is working on an aluminum smelter project worth US 2 billion in North Kalimantan. Adaro Minerals targets the smelter project to be completed in 2025. Editor's choice Australian regulator considers greenwashing complaint against Etihad. Teks_English: PT Astra Agro Sustainable Tbk Aali is committed to strengthening Astra Agro Sustainable's partnership with the palm oil growing community, ensuring sustainable supply chains and fair plantation practices. PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk Aali emphasizes its commitment to strengthening partnerships between the company and the palm oil growing community. This step was taken to maintain the sustainability of the company's supply chain and ensure the implementation of sustainable plantation practices. Solid cooperation between the company and partner farmers is the main key. Astra Agro Chief Operations Officer Arief Catur Irawan explained that this partnership is very important. Strong collaboration will encourage the potential of strategic palm oil commodities to provide great benefits for many parties. The flow of fresh FFB fruit bunches from partners to companies will be smoother thanks to the cooperation that has been established to support this partnership. Astra Agro Sustainable continues to develop various initiatives, one of which is through the 2026 Partnership Gathering which took place in Yogyakarta on 12-15 January 2026. This event is a forum for strengthening relationships with partners from various regions in Indonesia. Sustainable continues to innovate to support effective and efficient partnerships. The company continues to develop the Siska partnership information system which makes it easier for partners to manage FFB delivery schedules and this application service allows partners to work more structured and productive. Teks_English: Indonesian banking continues to demonstrate its commitment to implementing environmental social and governance ESG principles. This can be seen in the total disbursement of green credit which continues to increase. Data compiled by the OJK financial services authority from bank reports from state-owned banks shows that total green credit or financing throughout 2024 reached IDR 1,452 trillion. Chief Executive of Banking Supervision, Dian Ediana Rae, said that this achievement cannot be separated from the OJK's encouragement through various guidelines such as climate risk management scenario analysis, CRMS and the Indonesian Sustainable Finance Taxonomy. TKBI version 2. However, Dian realizes that the prospect of green credit still faces a number of challenges, such as the high risk profile, the long repayment period and the limited number of sustainable projects in Indonesia, plus projects like this, according to Dian, there is still a lack of data and information transparency. In addition, the world's commitment to the zero emissions target is also starting to loosen, as can be seen in the departure of a number of United States banks from the Paris Agreement and the Net Zero Banking Alliance. In the midst of the slackening commitment of a number of companies, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Persero TBK is still posting increases. distribution of green credit in the first quarter of 2025. It is recorded that the bank for the little people has distributed green credit amounting to IDR 89.9 trillion, an increase of 8.18% on an annual basis YoY. Director of Human Capital and Compliance Bri A Solichin Lutfiyanto detailed the sectors financed including sustainable natural resource management worth IDR 61.16 trillion, environmentally friendly products IDR 7.80 trillion, renewable energy IDR 6.47 trillion and green transportation worth IDR 3.55 trillion. believes that active contribution to achieving SDGS sustainable development goals will have a positive impact not only on the environment but also in strengthening the resilience of the national economy, said Solichin. Overall, Solichin continued, BRI's sustainable financing portfolio in that period reached IDR 796 trillion, which includes green financing for MSME financing as well as investment in ESG-based corporate bonds. This amount, said Solichin, is equivalent to 64.16% of BRI's total financing and investment portfolio of corporate bonds in the first quarter of 2025. This value takes up a portion of almost 25% of the total credit portfolio. Cimb Niaga on a bank only basis was recorded at Rp. 160 trillion. CIMB Niaga Business Banking Director Rusly Johannes said that the highest distribution was channeled to the micro, small and medium MSME sector amounting to Rp. 24.35 trillion. This value is equivalent to 43% of the total distribution of green credit. CIMB Niaga views that sustainable financing through KKUB is a very prospective sector in line with the increasing awareness of business actors regarding the importance of environmental and social aspects, said Rusly. Apart from that, Rusly continued. This financing is deliberately aligned with the commitment to implement a zero emission target by 2060 and the integration of ESG principles in all business activities of Cimb Niaga Bank. Rusly also said that he had initiated the one house one tree movement or planting one tree for one house of Cimb Niaga home ownership credit debtors to ensure the right direction in the development of sustainable financing. Rusly said Cimb Niaga had implemented various internal policies such as sustainable finance policy procedures, making a list of sectors with high environmental risk and actively monitoring the financing portfolio according to the KKUB categories regulated by the authorities. financial services in OJK Regulation No. 51 of 2017. These steps are a concrete manifestation of CIMB Niaga's support for the transition to a low-carbon Paris Agreement economy and achieving SDGs sustainable development goals through a more sustainable financial ecosystem, concluded Rusly

Teks_English: CNBC Indonesia An incident occurred on Sunday 24 12 2023 in the industrial area managed by PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park IMIP in Central Sulawesi. One of the furnaces of the stainless steel smelter processing and refining facility operated by PT Indonesia Tsingshan Stainless Steel PT ITS experienced a severe explosion at around 06.15 WITA on Sunday 24 12 2023. The furnace that exploded was furnace no.41. This incident also claimed the lives of 13 workers, consisting of 9 Indonesian workers and 4 workers from China who died. Meanwhile, 46 victims were injured, generally due to being exposed to hot steam. The management of PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park IMIP has formed a team to handle the impact of work accidents at the factory location. The management of PT IMIP has covered all costs for post-accident care and treatment of the victims as well as compensation for the families of the victims. We have also handed over one victim's body to the victim's family, said media relations head PT IMIP Dedy. Kurniawan in a written statement on Sunday 24 12 2023. Responding to this incident, the Coordinating Ministry for Maritime Affairs and Investment, the Coordinating Ministry for Maritime Affairs and Fisheries, immediately ordered regional parties to prioritize handling victims. The Coordinating Ministry for Maritime Affairs and Investment has asked regional parties to prioritize handling victims and their families, said the Deputy for Coordinating Investment and Mining, Coordinating Ministry for Maritime Affairs and Fisheries, Septian Hario Seto in a written statement on Sunday 24 12 2023. Seto said that regional parties had formed a special team responsible for post-accident handling. including emotional support for the families of the victims and a thorough analysis of the causes of the accident, he said, this step is to ensure that all aspects of this accident are handled seriously and professionally. We ask for a thorough investigation to find out the causes of this accident and that the regional authorities are committed to transparency and will share information as soon as it is available, he said. Indonesia Tshingshan Stainless Steel PT ITS is mostly owned by Chinese investors, 50% of PT ITS shares are owned by Tsingshan Holding Group Company Limited, then 20% are owned by Ruipu Technology Group Company Limited, 10% Tsingtuo Group Co Ltd, 10% Hanwa Company Limited and the remaining 10% are owned by investors from Indonesia, namely PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park IMIP, the Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources said PT ITS is the holder of an IUI industrial business permit. So the supervisory authority is under the Ministry of Industry based on data from the Ministry of Industry in 2018, in the IMIP industrial area, it produces up to 3 million tons of stainless steel per year, of which 1 million tons per year is produced by PT ITS, the rest is produced by PT Sulawesi Mining Investment SMII 1 million tons and PT Indonesia Guang Ching Nickel and Stainless Steel Industry GCNs 1 million tons in the Morowali Tsingshan industrial area and Bintang Empat Group is said to have invested around US 6 billion. From this investment in Morowali, Indonesia has become one of the stainless steel producers that is taken into account in the global market

Teks_English: CNBC Indonesia PT Indonesia Tsingshan Stainless Steel ITS Smelter Furnace in Morowali experienced a severe explosion on Sunday 24 12 2023. This accident caused a severe fire and killed 13 workers. Management of PT Indonesia Morowali Industrial Park IMIP has formed a team to handle the impact of work accidents at the factory location. Until 16.15 WIT, it was discovered that the situation at the scene of the incident was under control. Dedy Kurniawan Media Relations Head PT IMIP confirmed the number of victims who died was 13 people. consisting of 9 nine Indonesian workers and 4 four workers from China. Meanwhile, 46 injured victims were generally caused by exposure to hot steam. 29 injured victims have been referred to the Morowali Hospital. 12 people are being observed by the IMIP clinic and 5 five people are outpatients. PT IMIP management has covered all costs for post-accident care and treatment of victims as well as compensation for the victim's family. We have also handed over 1 victim's body to the victim's family, he said in a written statement on Sunday 24 12 2023. The chronology of the accident at the smelter, this tragic incident began when the burning furnace of Smelter No. 41 was initially still closed for maintenance operations when the furnace was not operating and during the repair process there was residual slag or slag in the furnace which came out and then came into contact with flammable items at the location of the furnace wall then collapsed and the remaining iron slag flowed out, causing a fire as a result of which workers at the location suffered injuries and even fatalities. The results of identifying the cause of this accident also confirmed that there were no oxygen cylinders that exploded as previously informed. Dedy said that currently the PT IMIP team was in the middle of coordinating with related parties, including safety tenants, national vital object security unit, pam obvitnas, imip area, central sulawesi police, danrem tadulako and government officials in bahodopi subdistrict and morowali regency

Director Apical Indonesia Operations Pe ter Setiabudi menyebutkan bahwa permintaan minyak sawit berkelanjutan terus mengalami peningkatan, namun petani swadaya masih menghadapi keterbatasan dalam hal keahlian dan sumber daya untuk mencapai praktek keberlanjutan. Oleh karena itu, dukungan yang tepat sangat diperlukan agar petani swadaya dapat bersaing di pasar dan berkontribusi pada upaya keberlanjutan.

Teks_English: National palm oil companies are ready to help independent smallholders to obtain sustainable palm oil certification or roundtable on sustainable palm oil RSPO which is required by the international market Director of Apical Indonesia Operations Pe Ter Setiabudi said the demand for sustainable palm oil continues to increase but independent smallholders face various challenges in achieving sustainable practices due to limited expertise and resources. Therefore, it is very important for independent smallholders to get the support they need to compete in the market and contribute to the sustainability efforts of the palm oil industry, he said in a written statement in Jakarta Wednesday. Through this program the company provides knowledge, training and workshops for increasing the technical knowledge of independent farmers and assisting independent farmers in achieving RSPO certification since it was launched in 2020, this program has had a positive impact on the lives of farmers in Indonesia, he said. 151 farmers are from Jambi. Currently, these independent farmers are still waiting for the process of issuing RSPO certificates. Apart from that, he added that for the second phase, he is targeting more independent farmers to join this program, up to more than 2,300 farmers. The next target is to support 1,284 independent farmers in obtaining RSPO certificates. Chairman of the Cliff Tinggi Consumer Cooperative, Pangan Sejahtera, KKTTPS, Cliff Tinggi Village, Labuhanbatu Regency, North Sumatra. Khairul Anam stated that this program has brought many benefits since his party received its first RSPO certification in 2022. better plantation productivity, better plantation management practices, consistent supply and getting farmers involved in helping protect the environment to improve their standard of living, he said, journalist subagyoeditor nusarina yuliastuti
